case_title: MITCHELL, HOWARD L. MPA VS KALIKA, ANATOLIY et al

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO ANATOLY KALIKA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT KALIKA, ANATOLIY MRS. KALIKA PLAINTIFF FAILED TO APPEAR. DEFENDANT APPEARED AND SUBMITTED AN ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FROM THE PLAINTIFF. THE COURT ACKNOWLEDGES THAT THE PARTIES ALLEDGE THAT THE HAVE SETTLED THEIR DISOUTE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,145.00 FILED BY MITCHELL, HOWARD L. MPA AS TO DEFENDANT KALIKA, ANATOLIY MRS. KALIKA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
